calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: ASSIGNEE THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Appearances:

Brian Miles, Esq., of Miles Westbrook & Deal, (925) 938-4500, for Plaintiff.

No other appearances.

Not argued/contested. The court notes Defendant's failure to appear. The Claim of Exemption is denied.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
